proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_enzalutamide=0 (overall, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_abiraterone=0 (overall, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_docetaxel=0 (overall, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_olaparib=0 (overall, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_lu177_psma=0 (overall, unadjusted).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different mean pfs_months than patients with treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (overall, unadjusted).

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.728 (n=20076) on treatment_enzalutamide vs 3.755 (n=29924) off; Welch t-test p=0.153.
Mean PFS 3.740 (n=14991) on treatment_abiraterone vs 3.746 (n=35009) off; Welch t-test p=0.776.
Mean PFS 3.732 (n=15187) on treatment_docetaxel vs 3.749 (n=34813) off; Welch t-test p=0.381.

Mean PFS 3.741 (n=7504) on treatment_lu177_psma vs 3.745 (n=42496) off; Welch t-test p=0.872.
Mean PFS 3.805 (n=2384) on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 3.741 (n=47616) off; Welch t-test p=0.137.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with mcrpc=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with mcrpc=0.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with visceral_mets=0.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with liver_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with bone_mets=0.
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with adrenal_mets=0.
Patients with pleural_effusion=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with pleural_effusion=0.
Patients with pericardial_effusion=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with pericardial_effusion=0.

Mean PFS 3.710 (n=2011) with pericardial_effusion vs 3.746 (n=47989) without; Welch p=0.426.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with brca2_mutation=0.
Patients with ar_v7_positive=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with ar_v7_positive=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with msi_high=0.
Patients with psma_high=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with psma_high=0.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with pten_loss=0.
Patients with her2_amplification=1 have either mean pfs_months than patients with her2_amplification=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have either mean pfs_months than patients with braf_v600e=0.

ecog_ps has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
psa_ng_ml has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
gleason_score has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
albumin_g_dl has a positive association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
ldh_u_l has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
hemoglobin_g_dl has a positive association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
alkaline_phosphatase_u_l has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
crp_mg_l has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
nlr has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).
weight_loss_pct_6mo has a negative association with pfs_months (Pearson correlation).

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=0.8555 between age_years and pfs_months (p=0, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.3885 between ecog_ps and pfs_months (p=0, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.1532 between psa_ng_ml and pfs_months (p=3.48e-260, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.0031 between gleason_score and pfs_months (p=0.486, n=50000).
Pearson r=0.1226 between albumin_g_dl and pfs_months (p=1.47e-166, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.0167 between ldh_u_l and pfs_months (p=0.000181, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.0102 between hemoglobin_g_dl and pfs_months (p=0.0225, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.0121 between alkaline_phosphatase_u_l and pfs_months (p=0.00663, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.0030 between crp_mg_l and pfs_months (p=0.507, n=50000).
Pearson r=0.0025 between nlr and pfs_months (p=0.577, n=50000).
Pearson r=-0.1427 between weight_loss_pct_6mo and pfs_months (p=9.91e-226, n=50000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Olaparib benefit (additional pfs_months) is greater in BRCA2-mutated patients than in BRCA2-wildtype patients (positive interaction).
Pembrolizumab benefit on pfs_months is greater in MSI-high patients than MSI-low (positive interaction).
Lu177-PSMA benefit on pfs_months is greater in PSMA-high patients (positive interaction).
AR-V7 positivity attenuates or reverses enzalutamide benefit (negative interaction).
AR-V7 positivity attenuates or reverses abiraterone benefit (negative interaction).
Docetaxel benefit on pfs_months differs by visceral metastases status (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: OLS PFS ~ treatment_olaparib*brca2_mutation: main treatment_olaparib -0.073, main brca2_mutation -0.071, interaction +1.619 (p=4.33e-61).
OLS PFS ~ treatment_pembrolizumab*msi_high: main treatment_pembrolizumab +0.075, main msi_high +0.052, interaction -0.340 (p=0.153).
OLS PFS ~ treatment_lu177_psma*psma_high: main treatment_lu177_psma +0.006, main psma_high +0.023, interaction -0.017 (p=0.737).
OLS PFS ~ treatment_enzalutamide*ar_v7_positive: main treatment_enzalutamide -0.027, main ar_v7_positive -0.014, interaction +0.002 (p=0.957).
OLS PFS ~ treatment_abiraterone*ar_v7_positive: main treatment_abiraterone -0.015, main ar_v7_positive -0.027, interaction +0.048 (p=0.334).
OLS PFS ~ treatment_docetaxel*visceral_mets: main treatment_docetaxel -0.027, main visceral_mets -0.063, interaction +0.052 (p=0.294).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca2_mutation=1 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_olaparib=1 and treatment_olaparib=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_olaparib when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within brca2_mutation=0 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_olaparib=1 and treatment_olaparib=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_olaparib when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within msi_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_pembrolizumab=1 and treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_pembrolizumab when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within msi_high=0 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_pembrolizumab=1 and treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_pembrolizumab when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within psma_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_lu177_psma=1 and treatment_lu177_psma=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_lu177_psma when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within psma_high=0 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_lu177_psma=1 and treatment_lu177_psma=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_lu177_psma when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within ar_v7_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_enzalutamide=1 and treatment_enzalutamide=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_enzalutamide when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within ar_v7_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_enzalutamide=1 and treatment_enzalutamide=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_enzalutamide when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within ar_v7_positive=1 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_abiraterone=1 and treatment_abiraterone=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_abiraterone when biomarker matches predicted indication).

Within ar_v7_positive=0 patients, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_abiraterone=1 and treatment_abiraterone=0 (direction expected to favor treatment_abiraterone when biomarker matches predicted indication).

analyses.result_summary: In brca2_mutation=1: PFS 5.216 (n=529) on treatment_olaparib vs 3.671 (n=4467) off; diff +1.545, Welch p=3.95e-27.
In brca2_mutation=0: PFS 3.668 (n=4569) on treatment_olaparib vs 3.742 (n=40435) off; diff -0.073, Welch p=0.0191.
In msi_high=1: PFS 3.527 (n=79) on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 3.792 (n=1449) off; diff -0.265, Welch p=0.239.
In msi_high=0: PFS 3.814 (n=2305) on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 3.739 (n=46167) off; diff +0.075, Welch p=0.0864.
In psma_high=1: PFS 3.743 (n=4486) on treatment_lu177_psma vs 3.754 (n=25476) off; diff -0.011, Welch p=0.736.
In psma_high=0: PFS 3.737 (n=3018) on treatment_lu177_psma vs 3.731 (n=17020) off; diff +0.006, Welch p=0.874.
In ar_v7_positive=1: PFS 3.719 (n=4019) on treatment_enzalutamide vs 3.744 (n=6019) off; diff -0.024, Welch p=0.557.
In ar_v7_positive=0: PFS 3.731 (n=16057) on treatment_enzalutamide vs 3.757 (n=23905) off; diff -0.027, Welch p=0.193.
In ar_v7_positive=1: PFS 3.757 (n=3023) on treatment_abiraterone vs 3.724 (n=7015) off; diff +0.032, Welch p=0.469.
In ar_v7_positive=0: PFS 3.736 (n=11968) on treatment_abiraterone vs 3.751 (n=27994) off; diff -0.015, Welch p=0.49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade predicts shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher pain_nrs predicts shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher dyspnea_grade predicts shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher cough_grade predicts shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher appetite_loss_grade predicts shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (one-way ANOVA).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.
Rural residence (rural_residence=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-rural.
education_years is positively correlated with pfs_months.
smoking_pack_years is negatively correlated with pfs_months.
prior_chemotherapy=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_chemotherapy=0 (heavily pretreated → poorer prognosis).
prior_radiation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_radiation=0 (heavily pretreated → poorer prognosis).
prior_surgery=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_surgery=0 (heavily pretreated → poorer prognosis).

prior_targeted_therapy=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than prior_targeted_therapy=0 (heavily pretreated → poorer prognosis).
prior_lines_of_therapy is negatively correlated with pfs_months.
years_since_diagnosis is negatively correlated with pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for ECOG, age, mCRPC, visceral_mets, albumin, LDH, alk-phos, hemoglobin, NLR, and prior_lines_of_therapy, multiple of these remain independent predictors of pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS adj-R²=0.9253. Coefs: age_years +0.1736 (p=0); ecog_ps -1.1513 (p=0); mcrpc -0.3711 (p=0); visceral_mets -0.0221 (p=0.00036); albumin_g_dl +0.4799 (p=0); ldh_u_l -0.0005 (p=4.6e-60); alkaline_phosphatase_u_l -0.0001 (p=0.32); hemoglobin_g_dl -0.0013 (p=0.36); nlr +0.0013 (p=0.26); prior_lines_of_therapy +0.0010 (p=0.66); gleason_score -0.0097 (p=6.5e-05); psa_ng_ml -0.0027 (p=0)

The effect of treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months is modified by ecog_ps (treatment × ECOG interaction).

There is a non-zero treatment_docetaxel × treatment_abiraterone interaction on pfs_months (synergy or antagonism).
There is a non-zero treatment_docetaxel × treatment_enzalutamide interaction on pfs_months (synergy or antagonism).
There is a non-zero treatment_olaparib × treatment_enzalutamide interaction on pfs_months (synergy or antagonism).

Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_olaparib=1 than treatment_olaparib=0 (biomarker-matched).
Among brca2_mutation=0 patients, mean pfs_months is similar (no large difference) between treatment_olaparib=1 and treatment_olaparib=0 (biomarker-unmatched, expect no benefit).
Among msi_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_pembrolizumab=1 than treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (biomarker-matched).
Among msi_high=0 patients, mean pfs_months is similar (no large difference) between treatment_pembrolizumab=1 and treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (biomarker-unmatched, expect no benefit).
Among psma_high=1 patients, mean pfs_months is higher with treatment_lu177_psma=1 than treatment_lu177_psma=0 (biomarker-matched).
Among psma_high=0 patients, mean pfs_months is similar (no large difference) between treatment_lu177_psma=1 and treatment_lu177_psma=0 (biomarker-unmatched, expect no benefit).

Within ar_v7_positive=0, mean pfs_months differs between treatment_abiraterone=1 and treatment_abiraterone=0; expected: in AR-V7+ no/negative benefit, in AR-V7- positive benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients on Medicaid or uninsured have shorter pfs_months than those with private insurance (after adjustment for ECOG and age).
Black race is associated with different pfs_months than white race after adjusting for age and ECOG.

OLS pfs ~ race dummies + age + ECOG

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca2_mutation=1, the effect size (mean diff) of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is larger than within brca2_mutation=0 (interaction confirmed by stratified diffs).
Within msi_high=1, the effect size (mean diff) of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is larger than within msi_high=0 (interaction confirmed by stratified diffs).
Within psma_high=1, the effect size (mean diff) of treatment_lu177_psma on pfs_months is larger than within psma_high=0 (interaction confirmed by stratified diffs).

analyses.result_summary: brca2_mutation=1 diff +1.545; brca2_mutation=0 diff -0.073; interaction p=4.33e-61.
msi_high=1 diff -0.265; msi_high=0 diff +0.075; interaction p=0.153.
psma_high=1 diff -0.011; psma_high=0 diff +0.006; interaction p=0.737.

Lu177-PSMA effect on pfs_months is modified by bone_mets status (interaction).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l predicts larger Lu177-PSMA benefit (positive interaction).
Olaparib effect on pfs_months differs by tp53_mutation status (interaction).
A composite 'biomarker-matched-therapy' indicator (any of: olaparib×BRCA2, pembrolizumab×MSI-high, Lu177×PSMA-high) is positively associated with pfs_months.
After adjusting for ECOG, age, mCRPC, visceral_mets, LDH, albumin, the matched_therapy indicator remains positive and significant.
Combining all six treatment indicators (additive), the number of concurrent treatments is associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: PFS 3.873 (n=5046) matched vs 3.730 (n=44954) unmatched; diff +0.143, p=7.78e-06.
